name: Collin Woods Golf - Golf Lessons in NYC
address: 100 Church St Basement, New York, NY 10007
about: Collin Woods Golf is a premier golf instruction studio located in New York City. The facility specializes in personalized coaching services, utilizing advanced technology such as TrackMan, Swing Catalyst, and K-Vest for swing analysis. Collin Woods, the head instructor, offers a holistic approach to golf instruction that includes biomechanics, technology, injury prevention, and mental performance coaching. The venue caters to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to competitive players, with a focus on individualized lesson programs tailored to each client's specific goals and physical capabilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium technology including TrackMan and Swing Catalyst for detailed swing analysis
Individualized coaching programs tailored to each golfer's unique swing and goals
Holistic approach combining technical swing instruction with injury prevention and mental performance strategies

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor with radar technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly mentioned, golfers typically bring their own clubs for lessons. The facility may have rental options available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information about outside food or drink policies is provided. BYOB status is unclear.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Since this is an instructional facility focused on lessons rather than full simulation play, 18 hole time would depend on lesson duration and goals.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes junior golfers and offers coaching programs for youth and beginners of all ages.
